creator: isaac@diversaform.com
text:
The sysinstall program does not seem to properly support GPT for EFI boards (over MBR/Bios). Freebsd loader in sysinstall for 7.0 doesn't seem to support booting off GPT partition.

This will become a common issue when commodity disks grow over 2TB, (MBR handoffs will likely become less common).

Fix: 

Patch/Hack good ol' sysinstall.  Run through Pawel's ZFS boot notes to see if his boot/install hacking to sysinstall have been fruitful.
How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD on an EFI board, and get sysinstall to boot off the GPT partition.
